name: The Reassurance
effect: Suppress escalation by asserting that the data exists and is retrievable. This card is considered calming.

clauses.name: CONTAINMENT CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If a stakeholder panics: Reassure them that the data is present and accounted for.

clauses.name: SEARCH EFFECT
clauses.rule: If the data is not immediately found: It is considered temporarily mislocated, not missing.

clauses.name: DISCOVERY OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If the data is never found: The query is considered malformed.
